_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI-specific acquisition models (e.g., pay per use or per data element).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data and AI business case construction, including value driver identification, benefit quantification methods, investment sizing, and risk-adjusted return analysis.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-007 (AG, cosine: 0.585), DG-K-006 (DG, cosine: 0.584).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.533). Shared vocabulary: [ai, data, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [acquisition, element, models, pay, per, specific] vs WIDAI-only terms [adjusted, analysis, benefit, business, case, construction] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.872, R=0.871). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.4%, N:77.5%, C:22.1%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of AI-specific acquisition models (e.g., pay per use or per data eleme" vs "Knowledge of data and AI business case construction, including value driver iden" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.596 > STS 0.533 (gap +0.063). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, data, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [ai, data, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [acquisition, element, models, pay, per, specific]. WIDAI-only: [adjusted, analysis, benefit, business, case, construction].
